title: Better Nether Map
description: Makes maps work better in the Nether and in other cave dimensions.
body:
This mod improves how maps work in the Nether and in other cave dimensions by showing only the blocks below a certain height, which can either be the height the map was created at or a value specified in the config.

![screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fdtm99de/images/38ecc01708573652a2ed861b55ece85698aa303d.png)
